Nancy ( 1. know / 2. want / 3. more / 4. to ) about the new technology.
[Mock 8-1]

title: 4級 模擬テスト8 読解 1
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, new technology has become very popular in Seattle. Since 2021, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 117 more events related to new technology.
explanation: grade4-08-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

passage: Recently, school club activities has become very popular in New York. Since 1993, many residents gather on weekends. Eve, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 166 more events related to school club activities.
explanation: grade4-08-reading-08: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト8 読解 9
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
passage: Recently, community libraries has become very popular in Seoul. Since 1994, many residents gather on weekends. Rachel, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 173 more events related to community libraries.
explanation: grade4-08-reading-09: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト8 読解 10
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, online lessons has become very popular in Tokyo. Since 1995, many residents gather on weekends. Ken, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 180 more events related to online lessons.
choices: Because no one joined the events.
explanation: grade4-08-reading-10: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。
